trace_events.description: Title screen: NUMBERS STATION BLOOM with instructions
Decision 1: Press Enter to tune into the numbers station — first action
Decision 2: Signal 1 is a color signal — click Option 1 to guess the matching color and tone
Decision 3: Signal 2 — choose Option 2 to match
Escalation: round 4 introduces pitch-based signals (low/mid/high frequency), time budget decreases
Final outcome: failure, score displayed with debrief
Sensory payoff: garden visible with decoded plants, musical chord or error tone played
Press Enter to restart — clean new run begins from title

audio_evidence: Web Audio API: sine/triangle/square/sawtooth oscillators for tones per signal type; success chord (C major) on win; error buzz on fail
